Font size: func value

Padding: func value

Width: func value

Paragraph with highlight element (mark and static colors).

Paragraph with highlight element (mark and variable colors).

Paragraph with highlight element (mark and no colors).

Paragraph with code element (code).

Paragraph with CMD + D element (kbd).

Paragraph with language element (bdo).

Paragraph with inline x 2 x^2 math element (math).

Paragraph with link element while having custom classname (a).

[Original Paragraph]

This is a test link element. It include strong , italic , span , CMD + K key, const $akbar inline code and highlight elements.

This is a test link element. It include strong , italic , span , CMD + K key, const $akbar inline code and highlight elements.
